layer_label_zh: 電源 · AI 伺服器電源 + 800V 架構

price_target.kill_condition: If AI infra power segment fails to scale > 25% of revenue by FY+2 → re-rating thesis breaks. Cut half. Two consecutive quarters of weaker AI power growth → exit.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI infra power as % of total — needs latest segmentation disclosure

B_order_visibility.note: Visibility usually qualitative — need careful sourcing for ★★★★

C_growth_potential.note: AI rack power 30→120 kW + 800V transition = step-change in dollar content per rack

E_increasing_moat.note: Power conversion efficiency + system integration + scale = compounding moat

F_revaluation.note: Conglomerate discount unwinding as AI power mix becomes visible

order_visibility.capacity_locked: [PENDING — Tainan / Thailand AI power capex with named application]

receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — AI 電源產能資本支出公告]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — most recent 法說會 on AI infra revenue % + visibility]
receipts.summary_zh: [PENDING — 法說會: AI 基建電源比重 + 訂單能見度]

receipts.summary_en: [PENDING — magnetics / SiC / GaN supply chain checks confirming AI power ramp]

order_visibility.kill: Two consecutive quarters where AI infra revenue growth lags AI server unit growth (margin compression in PSU). Or hyperscalers in-source power design (rare but watch).

mechanism.en: [PENDING ≥600 words: AI server PSU 3 kW → 5.5 kW → 12 kW + 48V → 800V architecture transition + on-rack BBU + sidecar power = Delta dollar content per AI rack 3–5× legacy. Quantify per-rack content and capacity share.]

moat_widening.en: [PENDING: Efficiency at 97%+ requires SiC/GaN expertise + magnetics IP + system integration. Delta is one of 2–3 globally with all three at scale. Capacity in Tainan/Thailand compounds.]

revaluation_thesis.en: [PENDING: Priced as an industrial conglomerate (EV + building + automation drag). AI infra power becoming the growth driver → segment re-rating once mix exceeds 25% with margin step-up confirmed.]

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler in-sourcing of power design or aggressive Chinese entrants (e.g. Wolfspeed downstream) compressing margin. Watch BYD / Inovance.

if_kill_then.en: Cut half on margin compression > 200 bps. Exit on two-quarter trend. Move to thermal (3017) which runs on different demand curve.
